recommendations.title: Holy Goalie
recommendations.overview: A young priest coaches a team of uncoordinated monks in order to win a soccer tournament and save their monastery from being turned into a hotel.

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in A Pony Tale
recommendations.overview: Barbie, and her sisters set off to the Alps for a riding tournament at their Aunt's Academy, but when Skipper finds out the Academy is due to be sold they set out to win. Barbie is distracted by the myth of an ancient species of horses.

recommendations.title: Escape to Victory
recommendations.overview: A group of POWs in a German prison camp during World War II play the German National Soccer Team in this powerful film depicting the role of prisoners during wartime.

recommendations.title: The Miracle of Bern
recommendations.overview: The movie deals with the championship-winning German soccer team of 1954. Its story is linked with two others: The family of a young boy is split due to the events in World War II, and the father returns from Russia after eleven years. The second sto

recommendations.title: Gladiators of Rome
recommendations.overview: A new hero is born in this hilarious, animated adventure of epic proportions! Timo, a student at the Gladiators? Academy in Rome, has no desire to become a legendary gladiator like his stepfather. That is, until the mesmerizing Lucilla walks into his

recommendations.title: Inazuma Eleven the Movie: The Ultimate Force, Team Ogre, Attacks!
recommendations.overview: An organization in the future sends the specially trained Team Ogre to defeat Endou Mamoru and his team, to prevent him from influencing the world with his soccer.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Switching Goals
recommendations.overview: Twin sisters Emma and Sam come up with a scheme to switch places so each can play in the soccer team they prefer.

recommendations.title: Lessons of a Dream
recommendations.overview: An English teacher brings soccer to a German school in the 19th Century.

recommendations.title: Gregory's Girl
recommendations.overview: A teenager falls hard for the female soccer player who has replaced him on the team and attempts to pursue her.
